ability.name: Internet Connectivity Check (HTTP)
ability.description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP HEAD request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses curl instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.

attack.technique_name: Network Denial of Service - Direct Network Flood

steps.description: Deadman ability that verifies internet connectivity by making an HTTP HEAD request to a well-known public endpoint. Uses curl instead of ping (ICMP) to test TCP-based network reachability. Returns the HTTP status code.
